problem: Dog owners need more than a weather check — breed-specific safety, pavement heat, and when to walk today.
targetAudience: UK dog owners who walk daily; especially multi-dog households and flat-faced breed owners.
differentiator: Pay once, no subscription. Multi-dog verdicts, 24-hour walk windows, pavement/UV/winter hazards.

featureBullets: Breed-aware safety for every dog in your home
Best walk windows for the next 24 hours
Pavement heat, UV, and winter hazard warnings
Pay once — no subscription or ads
Dog profiles stay on your device
